type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The decrease in cobalt disposals is consistent with stable ore composition, as most material processed in both 2023 and 2024 originated from the ODM zone with similar lithology.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The slight increase in cyanide disposals may be linked to normal operational variability in reagent use or ore chemistry affecting cyanide retention in tailings.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The increase in lead disposals likely results from localized variations in ore composition, with higher natural lead concentrations in certain sections mined in 2024.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The increase in manganese disposals is likely associated with localized ore zones containing higher natural concentrations of manganese in the feed material.
